nodes.text: Faust's Apartment
EXT. FAUST'S APARTMENT — DAY
Faust has an easel set up.
Every one must have a hobby. Said Aunt Grace, who set me up — who sorta got famous in the wild and crazy seventies.
Faust paints.
It's like reading to me — summoning that which exists outside and bringing it in. Painting burns an image from memory.
I've started getting better. Don't know what that means — only that I am starting to see things which should not be.
When nightmares keep me up at odd hours, I can relax with my demons and desires made firm in the slowing of paint.
Look what I've trapped. I think three elementals — water on the left, fire on the right, air in the middle.
Faust takes a hit off the joint he has and leans back.
While I painted, I talked to them — as they were modelling, and were sitting still indeed.
Faust looks over at his models — the three elements — while he paints.
It's cool how we can see ourselves as he paints us — even if it is all just tits and ass.
Quiet while he works on me. I think he really gets it. This is so exciting — can't you see.
You're just trying to win his favor. Make him an offer of power. Get on his good side — you're his astrological element.
No. I think this one isn't a dick — which is exactly why shit went down so bad previously. Old white men done stupid shit.
Reminder — he's just a kid. And look at how he's looking at me. I don't think it's the flames that are fanning his attention.
At least he reads. The last few have been rather dimwitted. Though I think we should try and warn him.
Not to play with fire?
Zing. You guys converse like I'm not even here. I can hear you just fine — which is cool, you dig.
See? I told you he knew we were here.
It's all good. He gets it.
If he gets it, why isn't wood here?
She's the frame, numbnuts.
Called it. Dude is awesome.
It could go either way yet.
Kid knows his shit.
However casually.
I just want to paint you. Not hash out some magical deal. So apologies if I get the details wrong — next time I'll take a reference photo.
